feed.title: SAP Community - Governance, Risk, Compliance (GRC), and Cybersecurity
feed.subtitle: Governance, Risk, Compliance (GRC), and Cybersecurity Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SE63 Incorrect translation
entry.content:
I have added in se63 translation of for long description of role that includes "=<" after saving and activation when I check for correctness in PFCG, additional signs appear - "=<(><<)>" instead of just "=<".

If anyone knows how to deal with it?

entry.title: SE63 hml wrong translation
entry.content:
I am struggling with strange case. I created the role in PFCG in EN, added long description like Limit responsibility based on the Amount from 0.01 to =< 50 000. Then went to se63 to translate -> others text --> z5--> agl role descriptions--->translate in SAP script editor, I put the description in DE Begrenzung der Zuständigkeit aufgrund des Betrags von 0,01 bis =< 50 000 , it looked okay there. I saved and activated. But in PFCG in DE, some additional sings are added like on the screenshot

Do you know maybe how to solve it to get rid off (><<)>?

entry.title: PSS Password reset after end user confirmation
entry.content:
For Password Self Service, we do not want to use authentication but just enter a existing user ID to login to the page. . As a standard the users password is being reset immediately and sent to the email address in user master. This way it is possible to reset other user accounts password (when logging in with that user name).

is there a way to prevent this? For example a very commonly used confirmation email asking the user if it was really them asking a password reset, and then only after confirmation the password is reset?

Any help / tips much apreciated!

entry.title: Security Log - T-code to "Display" information
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am looking for a way to identify which user displayed certain information with a particular T-Code within a given time-frame. With certain parameter entered, user can view the information on screen without print/extract in report.

I could use ST03N to narrow down the users executed this T-Code with the given time-frame (minimum 15 mins) . However quite a few user were running the T-Code, thus unable to identify who displayed the specific information we pursued.

Appreciate if anyone could shed some light or even potential approach to explore. Thank YOU!!

Regards,

Ada

entry.title: Security headers
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

How can we solve the missing security header issue in s/4 HANA 1909 as attched for:

1)X-Frame-options.

2)X-XSS-Protection.

3)X-content-type-options.

entry.title: GRC EAM logon error - Plan version current plan was set
entry.content:
Hello guys!

I have a SAP GRC DEV environment connected to an SAP QAS environment.

All settings for EAM have been made. When I have to log in through the GRAC_EAM transaction, I click on Login for the assigned FF, enter the reason Code, after that a pop up does not open with the screen connected to the target system. Instead, the message "plan version current plan was set."

entry.title: GRC 12.0 Success Factor Employee Central Standard Rulesets
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anyone know if there are standard rulesets for Success Factors Employee Central and Employee Central Payroll in GRC 12.0 that we can leverage? I have been searching and can not find anything except a post from 2018.

Looking forward to hear back from someone,

Heather Shiels

entry.title: Remove a button sap grc test of efficiency
entry.content:
Hello people.

I have a request from my client, to remove this button from the owner view. This is the view from the owner of the Test of efficiency. I tried to find at SPRO, but didn't manage, same to remove authorizations from roles.



If there isn't a standard way, there is no problem in that, just need to know.

Thanks for the help 🙂

entry.title: How to mass remove Profile from Users
entry.content:
Hello ,

i can find from SUIM T. Code all users in my Client , with SAP_ALL Profile.

How i can mass remove from some Users this Profile (SAP_ALL) ?

Thanks

entry.title: GRC FF WORKFLOW FOR REQUESTORS
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using GRC 12.0 and have enabled the standard workflow for the FF log review. It has been working as expected and the logs are being sent to the controllers assigned to the relevant FF's once the FF has been used.

The compliance department have deemed that the system, change, OS logs do not provide sufficient information on the change being made so want us to send the logs to the GRC requestor using the FF so that they can attach supporting documents and comments to the log before it is sent to the controller for review.

I thought I could simply use the GRAC_REQUESTOR agent in the first step, and then the GRAC_SPM_CNTRL_AGENT as the second step. The GRAC_REQUESTOR only appears as a notification and not an approver agent, I tried to build a custom agent ZGRAC_REQUESTOR and it allowed me to generate the flow but its fails as "No Agent is found" when the log is generated.

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: SOD Matrix in GRC
entry.content: How to view/download SOD Matrix from SAP GRC

entry.title: Connector Groups
entry.content: How to create Connector Groups in SAP GRC

entry.title: SOD conflicts in ACTVT level
entry.content:
Hello.

We testing new SODs and CA rulesets

In report the "false/positive" risk that ARA is showing is when we run the report to permission and action level.

Example:

User 1 have CA:

S_TCODE - TCD - OB52 - role 1 AND

S_TCODE - TCD - OB52 - role 2 AND

S_TABU_NAM - ACTVT - 02 - role 2 AND

S_TABU_NAM - TABLE - V_T0001B role 3 OR

S_TABU_NAM - TABLE - V_T0001B_COFI - role 3

But reality is that for S_TABU_NAM - TABLE values user has only 03 action.

As you see role 2 and 3 in conflict. It role 2 (with 02 action) there's no access to table V_T0001B, user can't change it.

And as a reasult we have false/positive" risk

How it can be changed? maybe some different mapping is needed

entry.title: GRC AC 12 configuration
entry.content: What are Add Ons required for the GRC AC 12 configuration?

entry.title: Federal Information Security Management Act (FISMA)
entry.content:
Is SAP Crystal Reports FISMA compliant?

Thank you.

entry.title: GRC 12 / config.parameter 1027 (enable offline analysis) with web service for risk analysis ?
entry.content:
Hi,

we are currently implementing the GRC Web Services from IDM to GRC.

When checking the risk analysis service GRAC_RISK_ANALYSIS_WOUT_NO_WS I was wondering if it is possible to also allow offline risk analysis (triggered via parameter 1027) via this web service.

I cannot find this attribute in the request template xml-file, so it looks to me that this is currently not supported.

Is this correct or are there other ways to get this option provided ?

thanl you

entry.title: Mass Maintenance of Mitigation Control Owners - Invalid Old Owner Error
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am trying to perform mass maintenance in GRC using Mass Maintenance of Mitigation Control Owners. I am  getting an "invalid old owner" status message when I import the XML file. 

I have verified the old owner and new owner are setup appropriately within Access Control Owners and are assigned to the organization. The old owner is still an active user. 

Could you please help me with this?

Thanks

entry.title: Is there anyway where we can see the user license details from GRC to the connected systems ?
Upload format for BPC ARA Ruleset in SAP GRC
entry.content:
We want to connect our BW/BPC system with GRC in order to be able to assign roles from GRC. However, right now we are doing risk analysis manually wherein go forward we want to include BPC risks as well in our GRC ARA ruleset but unable to find out the way to do this. 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
